items.q: Do Herzberg's hygiene factors motivate workers when improved?
items.correct: No — better pay or conditions remove dissatisfaction but do not create motivation; motivators like achievement, recognition and responsibility do that.
items.misconception: Improving pay and conditions makes workers actively motivated.
items.random_wrong: Hygiene factors refer to workplace cleaning rotas.
items.why: The two separate scales are the whole point of Herzberg and the most commonly missed detail.

items.q: Is Theory X and Theory Y a classification of workers?
items.correct: No — McGregor described two sets of managerial assumptions about workers; the manager's beliefs shape their leadership style, not the workers themselves.
items.misconception: Some employees are Theory X people and others are Theory Y people.
items.random_wrong: Theory X workers are those who work the X shift.
items.why: Misreading McGregor as personality types reverses the meaning of the theory.

items.q: Must employees fully satisfy each Maslow level before moving up?
items.correct: No — the hierarchy is a simplified model; needs overlap, levels can be partly satisfied simultaneously, and the order can differ between people and cultures.
items.misconception: The hierarchy is a strict ladder climbed one rung at a time.
items.random_wrong: Maslow's hierarchy ranks employees by salary band.
items.why: Treating the model as rigid law prevents the critique that IB markschemes reward.

items.q: Which is a Herzberg MOTIVATOR (not hygiene)?
items.why: The answer examiners want is: Recognition. “Pay” is the distractor this question was built around — if it tempted you, that's the exact gap to close.
Correct answer: Self-motivated and creative. “Lazy and need control” sounds right because it borrows the language of the topic — but it fails this question. Re-read the notes on why.

items.q: How many levels are in Maslow's hierarchy?
items.why: The real figure is 5. The wrong options cluster deliberately close — anchor the exact number to one concrete fact so it can't drift.
